reason: Package 2 of the UI/UX consolidation approved in UI-UX-SPEC.md (see DECISIONS.md, 2026-07-12). This package introduces DialogShell — one shared dialog frame (bold title + subtitle header, a hairline-divided footer that follows a fixed button contract: Primary verb right / Cancel left of it / optional destructive action far left) — plus a themed DwMessageBox, and retrofits PromptWindow, GroupDeleteWindow, SettingsWindow and TargetEditorWindow onto it, adds a ThemeChanged event so open dialogs follow a live theme switch, and a system-MessageBox fallback for startup errors before the palette exists. The visual design WAS reviewed: four composition variants were rendered as real mockups in design/mockups/dialog-shell/index.html (published as an artifact and shown to the owner), who chose variant 2 (divider + in-content header) on 2026-07-12. This waiver records that approval and scopes gate coverage to exactly the files that implement the chosen shell. It is not a 'non-visual' waiver — the mockup file in this same folder is the design evidence.
approvedBy: Ivan Larin (repo owner) via chat request on 2026-07-12
